prestazioni: 4B12 MIVEC 2.4L naturally aspirated engine: Full bolt-on forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tomei 80mm titanium wastegate. Supporting mods include a HKS Super Power Flow Reloaded front-mount intercooler (Delica D5-specific core dimensions: 600x300x76mm), a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank with dual Bosch 044 pumps, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU running a custom flex-fuel ethanol map with 1,000cc ID1000 injectors.

Chassis reinforcement and drivetrain upgrades: Cusco Type RS 2.5-way limited-slip differential with 4.875 final gear ratio, paired with a KAAZ 1.5-way front LSD. Full polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K, SPF0116K, SPF0117K) for subframe and control arms, combined with a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and rear sway bar (22mm solid).

Suspension and braking overhaul: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Delica D5-specific valving, 80mm stroke front, 100mm stroke rear) with Swift Springs (front: 8kg/mm, rear: 6kg/mm). Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors) up front with Ferodo DS2500 pads, and Brembo 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors) at the rear with Pagid RS29 pads. Stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge (part number GStop SS699).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works Delica D5 widebody kit (fiberglass construction, 50mm extended fenders front/rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders for additional clearance. Front bumper lip replaced with a Seibon Carbon fiber JDM-spec lip (Mitsubishi part cross-reference: MR516401).

Custom aero package: Veilside Fortune 03 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,500mm width) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals with adjustable angle (0-15 degrees). Side skirts from Rocket Bunny (Delica D5-specific, part number PB-002-D5) with integrated LED turn signals (Philips Ultinon Pro9000).

Interior and lighting: Full Recaro Sportster CS-II seats (Delica D5 bolt-in brackets, part number 29129-SP2) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point with harness bar) painted in PPG Mitsubishi Racing Green (code 426). Full LED conversion with LUX H8/H11/H16 bulbs and Morimoto XB LED fog lights (5,500K).
